results.rendered_html: sāṃdīpani m. (fr. saṃ-dīpana) N. of a Muni (accord. to  VP.  he was the tutor of Kṛṣṇa and Bala-rāma, and requested as his preceptor's fee that his son, supposed to be drowned in the sea but kept under the waters by the demon Pañca-jana, should be restored to him; Kṛṣṇa plunged into the sea, killed the demon, and brought back the boy to his father),  Hariv. ;  Kād. ;  Pur.

results.rendered_html: sāṃdīpani (von saṃdīpana) m. N. pr. des Lehrers von Kṛṣṇa und Balarāma, dessen Sohn von Kṛṣṇa nach dem Tode wieder belebt wurde,  HARIV. 4906. fgg.  5955 . 9044. fgg.  9158. fgg.  9803 .  VP. 561 .  BHĀG. P. 3,3,2 . 10,45,31 . 80,39 .  PAÑCAR. 3,14,52 . 4,3,137 .
